candidates.why: Primary revenue line; matches standard top-line sales and equals the detailed combined line but is the core label.
Not a revenue measure; tax-related balance sheet item, not appropriate for REVT.
Includes other income in addition to core revenue; kept as secondary fallback in case the pure 'Revenue' line is missing in some years.

variables.notes: Use 'Revenue' as primary REVT; 'Revenue and other income' as fallback priority if Revenue missing for some years.

candidates.row_label: Raw materials, energy costs and freight
candidates.why: Main direct production and logistics cost; clearly functions as cost of goods sold/cost of sales.

candidates.row_label: Restructuring costs in raw materials, energy costs and freight
candidates.why: Restructuring component of COGS, but not the standard recurring COGS line; excluded per instruction not to mix special items into base COGS.
Inventory asset, not an income statement expense; not suitable for COGS.

candidates.row_label: Raw materials energy costs and freight - Balancing value
candidates.why: Technical balancing row, not the primary expense line; excluded as per rule to avoid balancing items when main component exists.

final_choice.row_label: Raw materials, energy costs and freight

variables.notes: Treat 'Raw materials, energy costs and freight' as COGS; exclude restructuring and balancing sub-lines from base COGS.

candidates.why: Typical SG&A-type overhead bucket, but an explicit SG&A line exists and is populated, which should be preferred exclusively per hierarchy rule.
Duplicate/variant overhead label but appears unpopulated in preview; not needed since explicit SG&A line is present and used.
Explicit SG&A line, clearly populated; per instructions, when such a row exists and has data, it alone should be used for XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.row_label: Restructuring costs in other operating espense
candidates.why: Restructuring item within operating expenses; non-recurring and not part of normal SG&A base, so excluded.
Would be SG&A-type if populated, but appears empty and less specific than the explicit SG&A line; not selected given rule to prefer explicit SG&A row.

variables.notes: Use only the explicit SG&A row 'Selling and administrative expense' for XSGA, per hierarchy rule; do not include totals or restructuring/balancing rows.

candidates.why: Directly labeled R&D expense on income statement; best representation of XRD.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization/impairment, not current-period expense; not suitable for XRD.
Balance sheet balancing item; not a P&L R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense and other financial items
candidates.why: Line that combines interest expense with other financial items; good fallback if pure interest lines are missing for some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expenses on Capital Financing, Gross
candidates.why: Appears to be a component of interest on capital financing; useful fallback but not as broad as generic 'Interest expense'.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific subset of interest expense related to lease liabilities; useful as a component/fallback but not the main overall interest line.
Generic interest expense label; semantically the best single representation of interest expense, even if preview values are empty.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
candidates.why: Another capital-financing interest component; appropriate as a lower-priority fallback.
Interest capitalized to assets, not expensed; can serve as last-resort proxy if no other interest expense is available, but not preferred.
Concrete, populated pure interest expense line; best empirical representation of interest cost and should be highest priority in practice.
Interest component of pension costs; narrower than total interest expense; reasonable fallback if broader lines are missing.
Relates to derivative gains/losses, not pure interest expense; excluded.
Equity ownership portion, not interest cost; not applicable to XINT.
Same as above; equity interest, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; acceptable as lower-priority component if main interest lines are unavailable.
Derivative asset, not an expense line; not suitable for XINT.
Debt balance, not expense; excluded.
Debt balance, not expense; excluded.
Equity line, not interest expense; not applicable.
Equity minority interest, not interest expense; not applicable.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense and other financial items
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
Interest Expenses on Capital Financing, Gross
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Ordered to prioritize pure and populated interest expense lines first, then combined/segment components, with capitalized interest as last resort.

candidates.row_label: Share of net income/(loss) in equity-accounted investees
candidates.why: P&L share of earnings, not an equity stock measure; not suitable for book equity.

candidates.row_label: OCI - Share of other comprehensive income of equity-accounted investees, excluding remeasurements
candidates.why: OCI flow item, not a balance sheet equity total; not appropriate for BE.

candidates.row_label: Net gain/(loss) on equity instruments at fair value through other comprehensive income
candidates.why: Gain/loss line in OCI, not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent
candidates.why: Standard book equity for common shareholders; best match for BE as shareholders’ equity.
Includes non-controlling interests; acceptable secondary fallback if parent equity line were missing.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent

variables.notes: Use equity attributable to shareholders of the parent as primary book equity, with total equity as a fallback.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit, not the balance sheet minority equity; less ideal than balance sheet line for MIB.
Same as above: P&L flow; secondary to balance sheet minority interest for MIB definition.
Balance sheet minority equity; best representation of MIB (minority interest / non-controlling interests).
Alternative label for the same balance sheet concept; good fallback if primary label missing.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Total comprehensive income before attribution; not an equity interest; not suitable for MIB.

variables.notes: Use balance sheet minority interest lines (stock measure) rather than income statement attribution lines for MIB.
